ChatOperations_listChats.usage: try await client.chats.listChats(availability: .isMember, limit: 123, cursor: "example", sortField: "example", sortOrder: .asc)

ChatOperations_getChat.output: Chat(id: Int, name: String, isChannel: Bool, isPublic: Bool, createdAt: String, memberIds: [Int]?)

ChatOperations_createChat.output: Chat(id: Int, name: String, isChannel: Bool, isPublic: Bool, createdAt: String, memberIds: [Int]?)

ChatOperations_updateChat.usage:
let body = ChatUpdateRequest(chat: ChatUpdateRequestChat(name: "example", `public`: true))
try await client.chats.updateChat(id: 123, body: body)
ChatOperations_updateChat.output: Chat(id: Int, name: String, isChannel: Bool, isPublic: Bool, createdAt: String, memberIds: [Int]?)
